contentEn: SIPTRIX is an AI-driven creativity support tool for developing cocktail recipes through interactive exploration. Users build ideas via a mind-graph interface that connects ingredients, sensory qualities, techniques, and inspirations. We held a workshop at Bar Yoru with 11 mixology enthusiasts and 11 professional bartenders; the system helped non-experts articulate inspirations and gave the graph a role as a shared discussion space.
contentZh: SIPTRIX 是一款以 AI 輔助的創意支援工具，透過互動探索協助使用者發展調酒配方。使用者以心智圖介面連結食材、感官特質、技法與靈感。我們在 Bar Yoru 舉辦工作坊，邀請 11 位調酒愛好者與 11 位具三年以上經驗的調酒師參與；系統特別幫助非專家更清楚表達靈感，並讓圖像成為共同討論的空間。

contentEn: FlavorFace is an LLM-supported personal flavor wiki and node-based editor. Flexible “entities” (ingredients, recipes, memories, impressions) connect through tasks such as decompose, convert, and assemble. Subjective channels—taste, aroma, texture, culture, memory—stay editable; visual summaries help communicate flavor character. A UIST 2026 workshop in Detroit is in preparation.
contentZh: FlavorFace 是一款由大型語言模型支援的個人風味維基與節點式編輯器。彈性的「實體」（食材、食譜、記憶、印象）可透過拆解、轉換、組裝等任務連結；味覺、香氣、質地、文化與記憶等主觀通道可持續編輯，並以視覺摘要溝通風味特徵。目前正籌備 2026 年於底特律 UIST 的工作坊。

contentEn: A 2026 workshop with performing-arts students at National Taiwan Normal University explored mobile marker-based WebAR for theater. Participants built simple 3D characters and 30-second AR performance scenes, considering staging, timing, and hybrid presence alongside physical performers.
contentZh: 2026 年與國立台灣師範大學表演藝術研究所學生合作的工作坊，探索行動標記式 WebAR 於劇場的應用。參與者製作簡易 3D 角色與 30 秒 AR 表演片段，思考走位、節奏與實體演出者並存的混合呈現。

contentEn: GustoGear is a multisensory mixed-reality interface linking virtual events with physical taste and texture. A rotating gear presents flavored conductive jelly units; licking acts as both input and output. The work imagines flavor as programmable material for playful “virtual cooking” between body and digital environments.
contentZh: GustoGear 是一款多感官混合實境介面，將虛擬事件與實體味覺、觸覺連結。旋轉齒輪呈現不同風味的導電果凍單元；舔食同時是輸入也是輸出。作品將風味想像為可編程的材料，在身體與數位環境之間進行 playful 的「虛擬烹飪」。

contentEn: MAX Tongue explores tongue-based interaction in VR using EMG sensing and a lollipop-based demo. Different licking actions move targets in virtual space, inviting users to reconsider the tongue as an expressive input channel. Exhibited at Laval Virtual 2023.
contentZh: MAX Tongue 以 EMG 感測與棒棒糖互動探索 VR 中的舌頭操作。不同舔食動作驅動虛擬目標，邀請使用者重新思考舌頭作為表達性輸入介面。曾於 2023 年 Laval Virtual 展出。

contentEn: A procedural concept art workshop introducing Blender Geometry Nodes. Participants experimented with generative structures—ropes, urban scenes, mechanical spaces—learning procedural thinking as part of creative practice.
contentZh: 一場介紹 Blender Geometry Nodes 的程序化概念藝術工作坊。參與者實驗繩索、都市、機械空間等生成結構，學習將程序化思維融入創作流程。
